tasks.name: Create database view schema combining activity sources
tasks.purpose: Define a unified view that aggregates user activities from 5 different tables (lesson_progress, quiz_attempts, course_progress, building_blocks_submissions, survey_responses) into a single queryable interface

constraints: Use UNION ALL to combine sources
Include activity_type, user_id, entity_id, timestamp, metadata columns
Use security_invoker = true to inherit RLS from source tables
Handle NULL values appropriately (e.g., WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL for lessons)

tasks.input_state: Five separate activity tables exist with RLS policies. No unified view exists.
tasks.output_state: Schema file exists at apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activity-view.sql containing a CREATE VIEW statement that UNION ALL's five activity sources with consistent column structure.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file exists with valid SQL syntax, includes all 5 activity types (lesson_completed, quiz_completed, course_completed, storyboard_submitted, survey_completed), and uses security_invoker = true
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activity-view.sql && grep -q 'security_invoker = true' apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activity-view.sql && grep -c 'UNION ALL' apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activity-view.sql | grep -q '^4$'

tasks.name: Create migration file from schema diff
tasks.purpose: Create a timestamped migration file that applies the view schema to the database

constraints: Verify migration file is created in migrations directory

tasks.input_state: Schema file exists at apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activity-view.sql. No migration file exists yet.
tasks.output_state: A new migration file exists in apps/web/supabase/migrations/ with a timestamp prefix and contains the CREATE VIEW SQL from the schema file.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Migration file exists in apps/web/supabase/migrations/ with pattern *_user_activity_view.sql and contains CREATE VIEW statement

tasks.name: Update database by applying migration
tasks.purpose: Execute the migration to create the view in the local database

constraints: Use pnpm --filter web supabase migration up OR pnpm supabase:web:reset

tasks.input_state: Migration file exists but view does not exist in local database. Local Supabase is running.
tasks.output_state: The user_activities view exists in the local Supabase database and is queryable. View correctly combines data from all 5 source tables.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: View exists in database and SELECT * FROM user_activities LIMIT 1 returns data or empty result without errors
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web supabase db dump --role-only --schema public | grep -q 'CREATE VIEW.*user_activities' || psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_activities;'

tasks.name: Update TypeScript types from database schema
tasks.purpose: Regenerate type-safe TypeScript definitions to include the new view for type checking in loader and components

dependencies: Local Supabase instance with applied migration
constraints: Check that all columns are typed correctly

tasks.input_state: View exists in database but TypeScript types are not generated. database.types.ts exists but does not include user_activities view type.
tasks.output_state: database.types.ts file is regenerated and includes TypeScript interface for user_activities view with all columns (activity_type, user_id, entity_id, timestamp, metadata) properly typed.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: database.types.ts contains user_activities in Views section with correct column types

tasks.name: Create TypeScript loader function for user activities
tasks.purpose: Implement a server-side loader function that queries the user_activities view with pagination support and React cache() wrapper for per-request memoization

constraints: Use cache() wrapper for per-request memoization

tasks.input_state: TypeScript types exist for user_activities view. No loader function exists yet. Directory apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/ exists.
tasks.output_state: File user-activity.loader.ts exists in apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/ directory. Function loadUserActivities is exported and cached. It accepts optional limit parameter and returns typed activity data.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader file exists, exports loadUserActivities function wrapped with cache(), compiles without errors, and includes proper TypeScript types

tasks.name: Test RLS enforcement on user_activities view
tasks.purpose: Verify that the view correctly inherits RLS policies from source tables and users can only see their own activities

dependencies: Test user accounts with activity data
constraints: Test with at least 2 different user accounts
Verify User A cannot see User B's activities
Verify activities from all 5 sources appear correctly
Test via Supabase Studio SQL editor with SET LOCAL role and auth.jwt()

tasks.input_state: View exists, loader exists, but RLS enforcement is not verified. Test data may need to be created for multiple users.
tasks.output_state: RLS is confirmed working: users can only query their own activities through the view, and activities from all 5 sources are correctly filtered. Documentation of test results exists.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test queries confirm that user_activities view returns only activities for auth.uid() and blocks access to other users' data. All 5 activity types appear when relevant data exists.
tasks.verification_command: echo 'Manual test: Query user_activities as different users via Supabase Studio and verify RLS filtering' && test -f apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/user-activity.loader.ts

outputs.path: Test validation results (documented in task completion)
